title: calamus oblongus subsp. elongatus
intro: Calamus oblongus subsp. elongatus, also known as Acorus elongatus, is a type of rhizomatous perennial plant belonging to the Acoraceae family. It is a variant of the calamus plant, with elongated rhizomes and elongated leaves. The medicinal properties of Calamus oblongus subsp. elongatus include its potential as a carminative, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil for herbal remedies.
